pd_0_com_0text: Yes, Detective? Me and Defendant 1 are innocent. We were just studying our vocabulary lists together.
pd_1_com_0text: You used a double negative in that sentence; a person who breaks grammar rules surely breaks school rules!
pd_1_com_1text: You used 'Me' as a subject pronoun instead of 'I'; that grammatical slip-up reveals your hidden guilt!
pd_1_com_2text: Your subject and verb do not agree in that statement; I suspect your story is just as mismatched as your tense!
pd_2_com_0text: Ugh, my English teacher would be so disappointed! Okay, I was near the desk. But I saw Defendant 3 hiding something in their backpack very suspiciously!
